About This Dashboard
What It Does
Short-term momentum ranker scoring 700+ tickers on returns (1d to 1y), SMA gate (above 30/50/100/200 day), ratio consistency across timeframes, and resilience on bad SPY days. Higher composite scores indicate stronger, more consistent short-term momentum.
Today's Reading
# Market Momentum Analysis - Today's Data FSLY dominates the momentum ranking at position #1 with an exceptional composite score of 93.4, driven by extraordinary long-term returns of 432% over one year and near-perfect consistency across all timeframes (ratio_passes: 4/5). The stock's resilience is striking—it outperforms SPY by 409% over the year and maintains a clean momentum signal despite a slightly negative bad_spy_score of -0.19, suggesting it holds gains even during market weakness. VLO ranks second with more modest but steady momentum, returning 120% annually with strong outperformance versus SPY at 97%, though it shows an inverted weekly pattern (0.49% return) that creates ratio inconsistency compared to its daily 2.41% move. Both leaders pass all SMA gates (trading above 30/50/100/200-day averages), confirming technical strength, but FSLY's explosive multi-month acceleration (56.9% monthly to 210.7% quarterly) signals a fundamentally different growth trajectory than VLO's more cyclical energy-driven gains.
